content.text:
# Software Detailed Design: User Authentication System

## Module Breakdown

| Module ID | Name | Responsibility |
|---|---|---|
| SDD-MOD-001 | AuthCore | Core authentication logic |
| SDD-MOD-002 | TokenService | JWT token management |
| SDD-MOD-003 | SessionManager | Session tracking and cleanup |

## Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD
    M0[AuthCore]
    M1[TokenService]
    M2[SessionManager]
    M0 --> M1
    M1 --> M2
```

## Requirements Traceability

| REQ ID | Statement | SDD ID | Design Element | Source Files | Test Files | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| REQ-001 | System shall authenticate users | SDD-MOD-001 | AuthCore | - | - | draft |
| REQ-002 | System shall manage tokens | SDD-MOD-002 | TokenService | - | - | draft |

## Implementation Notes

- Use bcrypt for password hashing
- JWT tokens with 15-minute access and 7-day refresh
- Session tracking via Redis
